analysis:
【今日摘要】
今天市場情緒緊繃，受伊朗問題和石油價格上漲的影響，道瓊指數下跌。科技股尤其是人工智慧（AI）相關產業大幅下挫，Nvidia股價下跌16%。另一方面，蘋果公司宣布與布洛德康簽署合作合約，布洛德康股價大幅上漲5.2%。投資人正在關注藥物股Incyte和TG Therapeutics的快速成長。

【結語】
投資人們應該保持冷靜，避免過度恐慌。伊朗問題和石油價格上漲可能會對市場造成短期影響，但長期來看，市場仍然有發展空間。投資人們應該關注公司的財務表現和未來發展方向，避免過度依賴市場情緒。

【精選個股】
AVGO - 布洛德康 - 蘋果公司宣布與布洛德康簽署合作合約，布洛德康股價大幅上漲5.2%。
INCY - Incyte - 藥物股快速成長，投資人正在關注公司的財務表現和未來發展方向。
AVAV - AeroVironment - 公司最近舉辦分析師/投資者會議，與投資者分享公司最新發展和未來計畫。

風險提醒：投資市場永遠充滿風險，投資人們應該謹慎評估風險並做出明智的決策。

items.title: Why Broadcom Stock Fell 15% in June
items.summary: The diversified semiconductor giant couldn't quite live up to high expectations in its second-quarter earnings report.
items.zh_title: 為什麼布洛德康股價在六月下跌15%
items.zh_point: 布洛德康半導體巨頭在第二季財報公布時未能達到市場的高期望，股價因此下跌15%。

items.title: Dow Jones Futures: Tech Futures Rise, Oil Keeps Climbing; Nvidia, Valero, Dell, SpaceX In Focus
items.summary: Tech futures rose overnight after Nvidia, Dell and other AI stocks bounced and SpaceX hit a new low. Oil prices kept rising on Iran news.
items.zh_title: 道瓊未來指數：科技未來指數升高，石油持續攀升；Nvidia、Valero、Dell、SpaceX在焦點
items.zh_point: 科技未來指數在Nvidia、Dell等AI股反彈後升高，SpaceX則創下新低。石油價格持續攀升，受伊朗新聞影響。

items.title: 2 Fast-Growing Pharmaceutical Stocks to Buy Now
items.summary: Incyte and TG Therapeutics are seeing strong share growth, backed up by booming revenue and earnings.
items.zh_title: 兩家快速成長的藥物股買入時機已到
items.zh_point: Incyte 和 TG Therapeutics 兩家藥物公司因收入和盈餘大幅增長，股價快速上漲，投資人正在關注這兩家股東。

items.title: Apple scores record 89 Emmy Award nominations, with top category nods for celebrated comedies Widow’s Bay, Shrinking, and Margo’s Got Money Troubles, and global hit dramas Pluribus, Slow Horses, and Your Friends & Neighbors
items.summary: CULVER CITY, Calif., July 09, 2026--Apple scores a historic 89 nominations across 15 programs for the 78th Primetime Emmy Awards, and leads as the network with the most nominations in the Best Drama and Best Comedy series categories, respectively, earning top program nominations for comedies Widow’s Bay, Shrinking, and Margo’s Got Money Troubles, alongside dramas Pluribus, Slow Horses, and Your Friends & Neighbors. Apple’s breakout comedy sensation Widow’s Bay leads as one of this year’s most-no
items.zh_title: 蘋果公司在第78屆艾美獎中獲得89項提名，領先於最佳戲劇和最佳喜劇類別
items.zh_point: 蘋果公司在第78屆艾美獎中獲得89項提名，包括喜劇《寡婦灣》、《縮小》和《瑪戈的財務困境》以及戲劇《多元體》、《慢馬》和《鄰居朋友》，並在最佳喜劇和最佳戲劇類別中領先。

items.title: Why Broadcom (AVGO) Stock Is Trading Up Today
items.summary: Shares of fabless chip and software maker Broadcom (NASDAQ:AVGO) jumped 5.2% in the afternoon session after the company confirmed an expanded, multi-year partnership with Apple exceeding $30 billion for custom silicon components and wireless technologies.
items.zh_title: 為什麼布洛德康 (AVGO) 股票今天上漲
items.zh_point: 布洛德康股價今天下午大幅上漲 5.2%，公司宣布與蘋果簽署了超過 3000 億美元的多年合作合約，涉及定制晶片元件和無線技術。

items.title: Platner quits Maine Senate race; Democrats set to pick new nominee
items.summary: Maine Democrats must now replace Platner with less than four months until the midterm elections.
items.zh_title: 普拉特尼退出緬因州參議院選舉；民主黨將選出新候選人
items.zh_point: 緬因州民主黨必須在四個月內選出新候選人參加中期選舉。

items.title: World Cup drives Google Search to record queries per second
items.summary: The milestone comes amid Lionel Messi and Argentina's popularity.
items.zh_title: 世界盃足球賽帶動Google搜索量創下每秒查詢新高
items.zh_point: 世界盃足球賽期間，Google的搜索量創下新高，與阿根廷球星梅西和球隊的流行度有關。

items.title: Judge orders E. Jean Carroll be paid $5 million in damages from Trump verdict
items.summary: Trump was held civilly liable in two trials for defaming E. Jean Carroll when he denied her claim he sexually abused her in a New York department store.
items.zh_title: 法官判令 E. Jean Carroll 得到 5 億美元的賠償金從川普判決中獲得
items.zh_point: 川普在紐約一家百貨公司被指控性侵犯 E. Jean Carroll，法官判令他在民事訴訟中負責 5 億美元的賠償金。

items.title: S&P 500 futures are little changed as traders assess rising tensions between the U.S. and Iran: Live updates
items.summary: The U.S. launched fresh strikes on Iran, after President Donald Trump said earlier in the day he may no longer be interested in negotiating a deal.
items.zh_title: 標準普爾 500 指數未來價格幾乎不變，交易員評估美伊緊張局勢升級：即時更新
items.zh_point: 美伊關係緊張升級，美方發動新一輪攻擊，川普總統表示不再願意談判協議，美股未來價格出現波動。

items.title: Thursday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.summary: Rising oil prices and heightened tensions in the Middle East dragged the Dow lower on Wednesday. Tune in to CNBC Thursday at 10 a.m. to see OpenAI's Sam Altman.
items.zh_title: 星期四的大宗股票新聞：下個交易日市場可能會受到什麼影響
items.zh_point: 油價上漲和中東局勢緊張，令道瓊指數星期三下跌。星期四上午10點，請收看CNBC的節目，與OpenAI的Sam Altman交流。

items.title: Levi’s is finding new ways to win customers — by looking toward tops and ‘denim luxury’
items.summary: Jeans maker raises its full-year outlook for the second straight time, but shares fall after hours
items.zh_title: 萊維士尋找新客群 — 透過上衣和「牛仔高級品」
items.zh_point: 萊維士提高全年預測，第二次連續上調，但股價在交易後下跌。公司正在嘗試透過推出上衣和高級牛仔服裝來吸引新客群。

items.title: Higher gas prices aren’t the only way rising tensions with Iran will hit home
items.summary: Wall Street expects President Donald Trump’s call that the Iran cease-fire is over will hurt airlines and home builders more than it will help oil companies.
items.zh_title: 美國與伊朗緊張關係升高，將對多個產業造成影響
items.zh_point: 美國與伊朗關係緊張，將對航空公司、房屋建造業等產業造成影響，超越油價上漲的影響。

items.title: I started retirement with $3 million. Now I’m 89 and down to $2 million. What if I get sick?
items.summary: Even if you’re not worried about your normal spending anymore, a long-term-care need is still a problem for any budget.
items.zh_title: 我以3,000萬美元開始退休生活，現在89歲，剩下2,000萬美元。若我生病了？
items.zh_point: 即使你不再擔心日常開銷，長期照護的需求仍然會對任何預算造成問題。

items.title: Did you mess up on your taxes? The IRS just made it easier to avoid paying a penalty.
items.summary: It’s a ‘major taxpayer win,’ according to one advocate inside the IRS
items.zh_title: IRS 將稅務糾紛的處理方式簡化
items.zh_point: 美國聯邦稅務局（IRS）宣布，為了幫助納稅人避免罰款，將稅務糾紛的處理方式簡化。這被視為對納稅人的重要支持。

items.title: Oil prices extend gains after hours as U.S. forces conduct additional strikes on Iran
items.summary: Oil prices settled at their highest levels in more than two weeks on Wednesday, then extended their gains in after-hours trading after the U.S. military said it launched additional strikes on Iran.
items.zh_title: 石油價格延續漲勢 美軍對伊朗進行額外空襲
items.zh_point: 石油價格在星期三達到兩週來最高點，之後在美軍宣布對伊朗進行額外空襲後持續上漲。

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: 美國股市大幅下跌，受中國DeepSeek事件影響
items.zh_point: 美國股市大幅下跌，科技股尤其是人工智慧（AI）相關產業大幅下挫，Nvidia股價下跌16%。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: 紐約金屬交易所黃金、白銀價格下跌
items.zh_point: 紐約金屬交易所黃金價格下跌 1.4%，連續兩天下跌，白銀價格下跌 2.5%，連續三天下跌。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 中國DeepSeek AI的關鍵知識
items.zh_point: 中國新興公司宣稱，使用高階晶片的成本不高，訓練出高表現的AI模型。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: 深度尋找不會讓美國AI巨頭沉沒
items.zh_point: 對於Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭的股價下跌，恐慌情緒過於誇大。

items.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
items.summary: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.
items.zh_title: 科技、媒體與通訊產業簡報：市場熱話
items.zh_point: DeepSeek、SoFi等科技、媒體和通訊產業的最新發展，包括市場趨勢、股票表現和產業動態。

items.title: Tesco: Britain's Premier Supermarket Has Further Upside
items.zh_title: Tesco：英國頂級超市仍有更大的潛力
items.zh_point: 英國頂級超市Tesco，儘管面臨競爭壓力，但仍有發展空間，投資者應關注其未來發展趨勢。

items.title: AeroVironment, Inc. (AVAV) Analyst/Investor Day Transcript
items.zh_title: AeroVironment, Inc. (AVAV) 分析師/投資者日記錄稿
items.zh_point: AeroVironment, Inc. 舉辦分析師/投資者會議，與投資者分享公司最新發展和未來計畫。

items.title: Costco Wholesale Corporation (COST) Period Ending/ Trading Statement Call Prepared Remarks Transcript
items.zh_title: Costco Wholesale Corporation (COST) 期末/交易聲明電話會議備忘錄稿
items.zh_point: Costco Wholesale Corporation 公布期末交易聲明，內容可能包括公司財務表現、營業成績和未來發展方向等資訊。

items.title: The 9,500 S&P 500 Dream Is Dead
items.zh_title: 500大公司指數 9,500 的夢想已經破滅
items.zh_point: 500大公司指數的目標價格9,500可能已經不再可行，投資者需要重新評估投資策略。

items.title: Caesars Entertainment: Why A Merger Arb Trade Could Be Worth A Flyer
items.zh_title: 凱撒娛樂：為什麼一項併購套利交易可能值得投資
items.zh_point: 凱撒娛樂可能進行併購交易，投資者可考慮套利交易的機會，盡管風險仍存在。

items.title: SK Hynix jumps as $28 billion U.S. ADR pricing nears after strong demand
items.zh_title: SK Hynix跳躍為28億美元ADR定價臨近後受強烈需求
items.zh_point: SK Hynix因為28億美元ADR的定價臨近而股價大幅上漲，市場預期公司的新發行將受到強烈的需求。

items.title: Death toll from Venezuela quakes rises to 3,811 as government seeks frozen funds
items.zh_title: 委內瑞拉地震死亡人數升至3,811名，政府尋求凍結資金
items.zh_point: 委內瑞拉近期發生一系列地震，造成嚴重破壞和大量傷亡，政府正在嘗試凍結資金以應對此次災難的經濟影響。

items.title: Oregon community foundation sells $49,398 of Jewett Cameron (JCTC) shares.
items.zh_title: 俄勒岡社區基金會出售49,398股Jewett Cameron (JCTC)股份
items.zh_point: 俄勒岡社區基金會出售49,398股Jewett Cameron (JCTC)股份，交易金額為49,398美元。

items.title: Glaukos chief development officer Navratil sells $99,566 stock
items.zh_title: Glaukos 首席開發官 Navratil 賣出 99,566 股股票
items.zh_point: Glaukos 首席開發官 Navratil 賣出公司股票，交易金額達 99,566 美元。

items.title: US military says it is carrying out fresh strikes on Iran, after Trump says accord is ’over’
items.zh_title: 美國軍方稱正在對伊朗進行新的轟炸行動，美國前總統川普稱協議已經失效
items.zh_point: 美國軍方表示正在對伊朗進行新的軍事行動，美國前總統川普表示美國與伊朗的協議已經失效，這可能引發新的伊朗問題。
